what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset named p-04 in the design-source channel; it stores metadata (id, address, blob, mime, source, author, timestamp) and a one-line caption identifying the image as a design ground-truth source.
observations: YAML frontmatter carries asset metadata including a blob reference and a zero width/height
The image is a JPEG sourced from design_source_material
The body text labels the file as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-04.jpg'
standouts: The width and height are recorded as 0 despite the asset being an image
The record explicitly marks the image as a design ground-truth source
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata followed by a short plain-text caption
References assets via blob:// and image:// URIs
Records provenance with source and author_session fields
concerns: Width and height values of 0 may indicate incomplete metadata extraction
No links or relationships are recorded, leaving the asset isolated in the ledger
notes: A sparse but explicit ledger card for a single design-source JPEG, flagged as ground truth, with placeholder dimensions and no outgoing links.
questions: Is the blob URI resolvable and what checksum algorithm does it use?
What presentation deck or slide set does presentation-15p refer to?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a design-source image asset; it does that, but the zero dimensions and empty links suggest the record is not fully populated.
intention_signals: The file appears intended to catalog a specific slide image as an authoritative source asset within a presentation set, making it discoverable and attributable.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata card for a single design-source image, including blob reference, mime type, source lineage, and authorship timestamp, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the JPEG image p-04 in the design-source channel, flagged as design ground truth with blob reference and zero dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve a specific presentation slide image as an attributable design-source asset.
